response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable leadership in scaling AI systems in regulated fintech environments, has no explicit experience with financial infrastructure or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph, and his leadership experience is not clearly documented at the executive level required for a CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven ability to build and deploy event-driven, scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions through testing, CI/CD, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No evidence of leading engineering teams beyond 10 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lack of demonstrated experience in fintech, credit risk, or regulated financial systems
No clear track record of architecting model-agnostic, production-grade multi-agent AI systems with observability and feedback loops
